title: ARCHIVED Drug Establishment Licence Application Completion Checklist - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED Drug Establishment Licence Application Completion Checklist
This HTML document is not a form. Its purpose is to display the information as found on the form for viewing purposes only. If you wish to use the form, you must use the alternate format below.
Help on accessing alternative formats, such as Portable Document Format ( PDF ), Microsoft Word and PowerPoint ( PPT ) files, can be obtained in the alternate format help section .
Please ensure that the following information is attached before submitting your application package:
- Certified Statement of Revenue ( If applying for fee remission )
- Emergency Contact Information Form
- Alternate Sample Retention Site Form
- Foreign Site GMP Evidence
Total number of pages included in this application ( Including this checklist and any cheques, but not including GMP evidence )
Name and Signature of Company Contact
